---
title: "Samuel Vaillancout"
description: "Driving decarbonization strategy and implementation for one of the largest gold mining company globally."
image: /files/headshots/samuel-vaillancourt.jpeg
author: "Climate Guest Speakers"
date: "2024-11-04"
categories: [Climate and Career]
#bibliography: references.bib
#csl: chicago-syllabus.csl
#suppress-bibliography: true
#link-citations: false
#citations-hover: false
listing:  #an example of listing external links
#  template: item-default-external.ejs
- id: speaker
  sort: "date asc"
  type: grid
  fields: [image, title, subtitle]
  grid-item-align: center
  grid-columns: 2
  image-height: 300px
#  categories: true
#  sort-ui: true
#  filter-ui: true
  contents:
    - path: https://ca.linkedin.com/in/samuelvaillancourt
      image: /files/headshots/samuel-vaillancourt.jpeg
      title: "Samuel Vaillancout"
#      author: 
      subtitle: ""
#      date: "2024-03-12"
#      categories: [] 


page-navigation: false
title-block-banner: false
#toc: false
---

## Title

Gold mine sustainability

### Time

Monday, November 4, 2024, 6:00PM - 7:00PM

### Venue 
Online via zoom. Please email for access.

## About

I will discuss how I ended up in the privileged, hard but very rewarding position of driving decarbonization strategy and implementation for one of the largest gold mining company globally.

## Speaker

:::{#speaker}
:::


### Bio




<!--Include social share buttons-->

{{< include /files/includes/_socialshare.qmd >}}
